Headline: Yellow Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to a medical emergency on the tracks near Skokie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to a medical emergency on the tracks near Skokie.

Shuttle buses have been requested from Howard to Skokie to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines. Consider using the #97 Skokie bus for alternate service through the affected area.

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.
